ZAVORA FASHION
Bag 0

Privacy Policy

We respect your privacy and protect your personal information.

Privacy at Zavora is built around secure checkout, responsible data use, and clear customer control.

Information We Collect

We collect contact, shipping, billing, account, order, device, preference, and support information needed to operate our store.

How We Use Your Information

We use information to process orders, deliver products, prevent fraud, provide support, improve the website, and send optional marketing communications.

Cookies & Tracking Technologies

Cookies help us remember preferences, analyze traffic, personalize shopping, and improve site performance. You may manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

Payment Security

Payments are processed through secure providers. Zavora Fashion does not store full card numbers on our website.

Third-Party Services

We may work with payment providers, delivery partners, analytics tools, and support platforms only as needed to provide our services.

Marketing Communications

You may unsubscribe from newsletters at any time. We do not send spam or sell customer data.

Data Retention

We retain information only as long as needed for orders, legal obligations, security, and customer service.

Your Privacy Rights

You may request access, correction, deletion, or updates to your personal information by contacting our support team.

Contact Us

Questions? Email support@zavorafashion.com.

Privacy at Zavora
  • 256-bit SSL secure
  • Encrypted payments
  • Your data is protected
  • No spam
  • GDPR friendly
  • SSL secured
Last Updated

July 2026
